task: Use lynx -dump to fetch the Wikipedia article at https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tmux and extract the first sentence of the article. Write it to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
Fetch the GitHub API endpoint https://api.github.com/repos/tmux/tmux using curl -s, extract the stargazers_count field using jq, and write just the number to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
Fetch the Hacker News front page at https://news.ycombinator.com/ using lynx -dump and extract the first 5 story titles. Write them to /tmp/clive/result.txt, one per line.

Fetch the current weather for Munich using the Open-Meteo API: curl -s 'https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude=48.14&longitude=11.58&current_weather=true'. Extract the current temperature and write it as a number to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
Fetch your public IP address using curl -s https://ifconfig.me and write it to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Check the SSL certificate expiry date of https://www.google.com using: echo | openssl s_client -connect www.google.com:443 2>/dev/null | openssl x509 -noout -enddate. Write the expiry date to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
Look up the DNS A records for ikangai.com using dig or nslookup and write all IP addresses to /tmp/clive/result.txt, one per line.

Fetch the BBC News RSS feed at https://feeds.bbci.co.uk/news/rss.xml using curl -s and extract all article titles (inside <title> tags). Write the first 10 titles to /tmp/clive/result.txt, one per line.
Download the robots.txt file from https://www.google.com/robots.txt using curl -s and compute its MD5 hash. Write just the hash to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
Measure the HTTP response time of https://httpbin.org/get using curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{time_total}'. Write the time in seconds to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
Fetch information about Germany from https://restcountries.com/v3.1/name/germany using curl -s, extract the population number using jq '.[0].population', and write it to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Check if the following 3 URLs return HTTP 200: https://www.google.com, https://www.github.com, https://httpbin.org/status/404. Write each URL and its status code to /tmp/clive/result.txt as 'URL STATUS_CODE', one per line.
Fetch https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/users using curl -s. Extract a CSV with columns: id,name,email. Write the CSV (with header row) to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
Fetch the latest EUR to USD exchange rate from https://open.er-api.com/v6/latest/EUR using curl -s and jq. Write just the USD rate as a decimal number to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
Fetch the sitemap from https://www.sitemaps.org/sitemap.xml using curl -s and extract all <loc> URLs. Write them to /tmp/clive/result.txt, one per line.

Fetch posts from https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts?_limit=3 and users from https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/users?_limit=3. Join them by userId and write each post's title with the author's name to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
Perform a whois lookup on ikangai.com and extract the registrar name. Write it to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Fetch the top posts from Reddit's programming subreddit using curl -s -H 'User-Agent: clive/1.0' 'https://www.reddit.com/r/programming/top.json?limit=5'. Extract the post titles and write them to /tmp/clive/result.txt, one per line.
Test all HTTP methods (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE) against https://httpbin.org/{method} using curl. For each method, write the method and whether it returned 200 to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
Fetch https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Curl_(programming_language) using lynx -dump and count the total number of words on the page. Write just the word count number to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
